title: rhododendron calendulaceum f. aurantium
intro: Rhododendron calendulaceum f. aurantium is a variant of the flame azalea, a flowering shrub known for its vibrant orange and red flowers. The plant is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rhododendron calendulaceum f. aurantium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin for therapeutic benefits.
